TextENGNew: ...At first, he struck me as the quintessential 'city kid.'
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The studious type who would probably panic if caught in a sudden crisis--in a word, a 'model student' kind of boy.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: When Rena transferred in, I could just talk to her casually. But I had heard that boys this age tend to be reluctant to get close to girls.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: So when he actually walked into the classroom on his first day, I honestly felt a bit weighed down, worrying about how to approach him and how to help him fit into the class.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: But... it really was a case of the old saying, 'Easier done than feared.' Appearances aside, he turned out to be incredibly easy to talk to, had a great sense of humor, and... was a genuinely interesting guy.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Best of all, he did not wear his city upbringing on his sleeve. He was neither arrogant nor self-deprecating. He was completely natural, and... even from just a short conversation, I could tell with certainty that we would get along perfectly.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Our little group had always been all girls, but... when I tentatively invited him to join, he blended right in without any fuss.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: He jumped into our club games with enthusiasm, and instead of just holding his own, he started launching full-blown counterattacks. His adaptability was, honestly, beyond anything I expected.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I felt a thrill of excitement.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Things had been fun before, but starting tomorrow, they were going to be even more lively and entertaining.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Aah, I could not wait for tomorrow to come.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: What game should we play tomorrow, and what kind of penalty game should we come up with...?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Picturing his face from today--frustrated one moment, delighted the next, his emotions written plainly across his features--I drifted into drowsy consciousness and sailed off into the sea of sleep...
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
